expo.name: Spark
expo.description: Spark - Your AI companion for anxiety relief, professional growth, and a good laugh.

infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Spark uses your microphone to enable voice input so you can speak to your AI companion hands-free.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Spark uses speech recognition to transcribe your voice messages.

plugins.microphonePermission: Spark uses your microphone to enable voice input so you can speak to your AI companion hands-free.
